ActionPlanTemplate.description: Standard milestone tasks for a CE-class NEPA review. Target: 30 days from application receipt to CE determination. Assign to IndividualApplication with Review Type = CE.
ActionPlanTemplate.name: NEPA CE Process Milestones

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Review automated CE screening result (nepa_screening_confidence__c, nepa_process_code__c). Verify the recommended CE code applies to the proposed action and physical parameters. Confirm no extraordinary circumstances are present at the project site. Due day 5.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Prepare the CE Determination document citing the applicable CE code (nepa_process_code__c), regulatory citation (nepa_regulatory_citation__c), and extraordinary circumstances certification. Upload to ContentVersion with document type = CE Determination and record category = Decision Record. Due day 15.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Supervisor Review and Approval of CE Determination

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: NEPA supervisor reviews CE Determination for legal sufficiency, correct CE code citation, and extraordinary circumstances sign-off. Approve or return for revision. Update ContentVersion status to Approved when complete. Due day 25.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Issue CE Determination and Close Record

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Issue CE Determination and Close NEPA Record

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish CE Determination. Set ContentVersion status = Published. Update IndividualApplication: nepa_process_status__c = completed, nepa_completion_date__c = today. Notify applicant. Due day 30.
